meta.description: Type-specific card evaluation with per-card winrate data and card-type-aware strategic modifiers
changes: T002: Added cost and threshold validation
T004-T008: Added board development, mana efficiency, threat deployment, life pressure features
T011: Integrated strategic modifiers into search scoring
T012-T014: Refined candidate generation and prioritization
T048: Increased early mana development priority (w_sites 2.0→3.5, extended establish_mana_base to turn 6)
T061: AGGRESSIVE TUNING - penalize drawing, boost sites, board development, life pressure
T078: BALANCED - moderate hand penalty, tactical draw modifiers, conditional draw generation
T100: DETERMINISTIC RULES - Turn 1 ALWAYS plays site, bypasses scoring for obvious plays
T101: ATTACK PRIORITY - Sites first for mana denial, lethal always taken
T102: THRESHOLD-AWARE DRAWING - Analyzes hand for missing thresholds
T103: LEARNED PATTERNS - 100 replay analysis, penalize early unit overextension
T200: TYPE-SPECIFIC EVALUATION - Per-card-type evaluators (Site, Minion, Magic, Aura, Artifact) with keyword bonuses, stats efficiency, board context
T201: WINRATE INTEGRATION - Production winrate data as power tier signal (tier 1-5)
T202: AVATAR TAP ALTERNATIVES - Bot evaluates drawing a site vs placing one
T203: TYPE-AWARE MODIFIERS - Strategic modifiers for play_magic, play_aura, play_artifact, avatar_tap

weights._comment_cards: Card advantage (T078: BALANCED - moderate penalty to encourage action while maintaining options)
weights._comment_mana: Mana and resources (T061: MASSIVELY boost sites and board presence)
weights._comment_refined: REFINED FEATURES (T061: boost aggression and board presence)

strategic_modifiers._comment: Phase-based type-specific strategy (T200: card-type-aware modifiers for Site, Minion, Magic, Aura, Artifact)

turn_1_mandatory_site._comment: T103: Site is mandatory on turn 1. All non-site plays heavily penalized.

establish_mana_base._comment: T200: Added type-specific modifiers. Auras/artifacts too early. Avatar tap okay for drawing sites.

attack_phase._comment: T200: Magic spells (removal/tricks) highly valued during combat phase

defend_lethal._comment: T200: Removal spells critical when defending. No time for enchantments.

quality_metrics._comment: Expected performance metrics for this theta

deterministic_rules._comment: T100: Rules that bypass scoring entirely - obvious plays

turn_2.rule: Play site unless 1-cost creature is playable
turn_2.exception: If 1-cost creature can be played, use scoring to decide

turn_3.rule: Play site to reach 3 mana base

order: 1. Avatar (if lethal - ALWAYS take the kill)
2. Sites (mana denial - highest value early game)
attack_priority.rationale: Destroying sites early denies opponent mana, which compounds over the game

rules: Turn 4 with < 4 sites: Draw site (reach 4 mana)
Missing threshold for hand cards: Draw site
Have 4+ sites and full threshold: Draw spell

learned_patterns._comment: T103: Patterns extracted from 100 production replays (2026-01-25)

key_insights.evidence: Both winners (100) and losers (100) play exactly 1 site on turn 1
key_insights.action: Deterministic rule: ALWAYS play site on turn 1

key_insights.evidence: Losers play 50 units on turn 1 vs winners 26 (192% more)
key_insights.action: Heavily penalize unit plays on turn 1 (modifier: 0.1)

key_insights.evidence: Losers deploy 112 units on turn 3 vs winners 82 (37% more)
key_insights.action: Reduced unit modifier in establish_mana_base phase (0.3→0.2)

key_insights.evidence: 100% spellbook draws for winners (may indicate established mana bases)
Winners avg 13.2 turns, losers avg 13.3 turns
key_insights.action: Plan for mid-game aggression around turn 5-6
